input.background: The case-control study on esophageal cancer and alcohol use also collected data on tobacco use as a potential risk factor, with tobacco use dichotomized at 20 grams/day.
input.question: Interpret the results.

output.method: 回归系数显著性与方向解读
output.answer: The point estimate suggests that there is 96% increase in risk associated with this level of tobacco use.

Tobacco_use.description: Tobacco use categorized by daily consumption in grams.

Noncases.description: Number of non-cases (controls) in the study.
